title: Ensure Test Classes Follow Naming Convention
description: This rule checks if the name of a test class matches the provided regular expression. Shared naming conventions are crucial for efficient team collaboration. Non-compliance triggers an issue.
recommendation: Rename the test class to match the regular expression ^((Test|IT)[a-zA-Z0-9_]+|[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*(Test|Tests|TestCase|IT|ITCase))$
impact: Non-compliance to naming conventions can lead to confusion and reduced efficiency in code collaboration.

checks.message: Rename the test class to match the regular expression ^((Test|IT)[a-zA-Z0-9_]+|[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*(Test|Tests|TestCase|IT|ITCase))$
